title: X650C-H626DEJ-P-191023V236-191127V258_20191128100643
description:
Caution! This update may crash rooted devices.
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.
Update Version: X650C-H626DEJ-P-191127V258
Changed Functions:
1. Updated to the latest Google Security Patch 20191205
2. Updated to Google GMS package201910
3. Updated XOS to v5.5 with more functions, Social Turbo, Game Assistant, Game Floating Window, Sensor call picker, Notification optimization, Magazine Preview etc.
Optimized issue:
1. Optimized touch panel performance
Reminding:
1.Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2.Visit the XCLUB forum (http://bbs.infinixmobility.com) for more information.
